key_turning_points.title: Terraformer claim plus continued closure pressure prevented a long engine game
Board/card-VP pivot with Domed Crater and Builder kept the game close
Opponent funded Banker, Miner, and later Scientist without meaningful contest

counterfactuals.change: Make an explicit Gen 7 contest-or-concede decision on Banker and Miner before John can lock all three awards
Convert one additional midgame action into city-denial/adjacency pressure around John's cluster instead of pure TR tempo
Fund a live award only if first-place hold is credible; otherwise convert that timing window into direct board VP

rule_updates: If the opponent has two or more strong award lanes by Gen 7, then make a written contest-or-concede decision before they fund.
If one global is within 3 to 4 steps of completion, then prefer city-and-greenery VP conversion over another generic terraforming action when immediate adjacency exists.
If a late animal or card-VP play does not score within one guaranteed follow-up action, then favor immediate board VP or closure instead.
